23:30 â December 28, 2023
Update to the Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
We updated the
Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725
, as announced in the
2024 Indicative Pricing for Digital and Payment Solutions
notice published September 28, 2023. Additional changes are described
here
.
The Digital & Payment Services Class A Fee Schedule, Form 2725, is available to BC and Ontario Class A credit unions only. The fee changes come into effect January 1, 2024.
